title: Extracting Full Names from Text
scenario: Write a prompt to extract full names from a given text, using the format 'First Name Last Name' and outputting a list of names. The name list should be separated by commas, and the first name should be capitalized. The input text contains multiple names, but the names may also appear as initials or first names only. For example, 'John Smith, 345-678-9012, Dr. Jane Doe' would be output as 'John Smith, Jane Doe'.
constraints: Must use a list to separate names

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output adheres to the given constraints.
Judge the tone of the output, ensuring it is neutral.
Check if the output is a valid list of names.
